---
title: "Music"
---

::::: grid
::: g-col-4
![Natalie + Eric = Cape Weather](images/corkboard.JPG){fig-align="left" width="300"}
:::

::: g-col-8
Before transitioning into the environmental field, I spent over 5 years as a professional musician—creating, performing, and teaching music to diverse audiences. As part of **Cape Weather**, I wrote and performed original music, releasing over six EPs, including the critically acclaimed single "Telephono." I established a solid presence in the music industry through a range of performances, collaborations, strategic planning, and effective branding, which led to over 3 million streams on [Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/artist/7J1pOyIKObwsdVRzu4scnI?si=LSluu_L8Q_-RG6FlWk1BIQ), along with music placements in film and television. Additionally, I collaborated to create engaging music videos that visually brought our songs to life. Our music has been featured on NPR and Los Angeles' KCRW. As a solo vocalist, I have performed at 100+ corporate and private events and provided background vocals for artists like Ben Folds.

While my career has since shifted to climate and sustainability—a passion that's central to my work now—I still love music and play in my free time.

Below is some music I've created over the years.
:::
:::::

<br>

```{=html}
<style>
.center {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  flex-wrap: wrap; /* Allows images to wrap in case of small screens */
}
.image-grid {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
}
</style>
```

:::: center
::: image-grid
[![telephono_crop](images/telephono_crop.jpg){width="300"}](https://capeweatherband.bandcamp.com/track/telephono-3) [![ruin my day](images/ruin_my_day.jpg){width="300"}](https://capeweatherband.bandcamp.com/track/ruin-my-day) [![self titled](images/self_titled.jpg){width="300"}](https://capeweatherband.bandcamp.com/album/cape-weather)
:::
::::

::: image-grid
[![slow dance](images/slow_dance.PNG){width="300"}](https://capeweatherband.bandcamp.com/album/slow-dance-2) [![hunny vol. 1](images/hunny1.jpg){width="300"}](https://capeweatherband.bandcamp.com/album/hunny-vol-1) [![hunny vol. 2](images/hunny2.jpg){width="300"}](https://capeweatherband.bandcamp.com/album/hunny-vol-2)
:::

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=67ifaPm2OCE&list=PLxQOolG5C6cHGcbgSbTJjAV-c7ipobiw1&index=1>}}
